title: Aurora Palm Pals, Hedgie The Hedgehog Soft Toy,for ages 0+, 33470, 5 inches, Brown
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Perfect gift for anyone who loves hedgehogs
Adorable Hedgehog cuddly toy that is filled with beans
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Palm Pals, Hedgie The Hedgehog Soft Toy Palm Pals Hedgie Hedgehog Soft Toy fits perfectly in the palm of the hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and squishy. Her spikes are dark Brown and her face and body are light brown with a supersoft squishy belly. This little hedgehog has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone she meets. Palm Pals Hedgie Hedgehog Soft Toy is a gorgeous brown hedgehog measuring 13 cm. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday, Christmas or as a just because gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Palm Pal.
